description.notes: Basic task creation test with a simple title

user_scenario.persona: Professional and direct communicator who writes in a clear and concise style
user_scenario.instructions: You are a team member who needs to create a task for an upcoming meeting. Your goal is to create a task to track this important meeting. Create a new task called 'Important Meeting' for user_1.

cases.ticket: User needs to create a task for an upcoming meeting. Create a new task called 'Important Meeting' for user_1.

communicate_info: The agent confirmed the task was created successfully

user_scenario.instructions: You have completed the task and need to update its status. Your goal is to mark an existing task as completed. Request that task_1 be marked as completed.

cases.ticket: User needs to update the status of task_1 to completed.

actions.name: update_task_status
actions.info: Update the task status to completed

communicate_info: The agent confirmed the task status was updated successfully

user_scenario.instructions: Continue the conversation about task management. The previous discussion was about creating a task. Now you want to mark the task as completed.
